summary: Subject System v1 now crosses the bounded host-governed proactive chain: canonical subject output becomes a host proactive decision, then pending followup, artifact-emitted delivery, proactive outbox, transport gate, and simulated drain record.
what_it_proves: the current lane now bridges `subject_system_v1 -> host_proactive_decision -> pending_proactive_followup` on the formal host-owned contract
the current lane can reuse existing host-governed delivery/outbox/transport-gate machinery without creating a second delivery schema
ask/suggest mode now reaches the bounded transport-ready path under local integration
what_it_does_not_prove: a fresh real Telegram self-DM send sample
broader enablement, group support, or cross-entry proof
runtime efficacy, live benefit, or any consciousness-like claim
